# Discovery Branch Nucleation

Branch nucleation is hardened by rollout order-parameter traces, event-window detection, model comparison and shuffled/architectural negative controls.

## Tier

- tier: strong
- rollout_based: True
- lineage_separation_event_effect: -0.635999 [-0.792743, -0.486311]
- permutation_q: 0.00990099
- seed_stability_pass: True (sign consistency=1.000)
- negative_control_pass: True
- best_interpretation: transient_condensation_before_divergence
